title: Rejected and Perfected
description: Adds rejected stuff to Minecraft. Also some stuff that would fit in Minecraft.
body:
Based on adding stuff that was removed, not added, or should be in the game.
Some of the mods that is included are: Friends and Foes, Copper Items, Iris Shaders, Macaw's Furniture, and Simple Hydration. 

The reason this modpack was made is because I wanted to add some mods that bring things to the game that were either removed, rejected, or would be good in the ga

I made the modpack so you don't have to add all the mods into a modpack yourself. I will add a discord later when I make it.

This modpack works in servers, but it will not show every mod (Friends and Foes, Copper Items, Simple Hydration, ect.). The person you are playing multiplayer with will need the modpack only if it is on your world.
